name: academorix/announcements
purpose: Broadcast announcements — Announcement + AnnouncementView aggregates for tenant admins to publish acknowledgement-tracked messages to segments.
capabilities: AnnouncementView (anv_ prefix) — per-user read + acknowledged tracking
when_to_use: A tenant admin needs to broadcast a message with per-user acknowledgement tracking to all or a subset of users.
when_not_to_use: For transactional per-user notifications, use academorix/notifications. For editorial newsletter cadences, use academorix/newsletter.
